title: Craft 3D - Heycronus
description: Adds optimized 3D models to blocks, items, and animals while keeping the vanilla style.
body:
![3d craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd372e46217008ac0dd8db7ff52ad733cf0cbfa.png)

3DPack enhances Minecraft’s visuals by adding clean, optimized 3D models to several blocks, items, and entities, while preserving the original vanilla style of the game.

The pack adds depth and detail to many commonly used blocks and also includes updated 3D item models, creating a more immersive and polished visual experience without changing gameplay.

To complete the upgrade, 3DPack features enhanced 3D models for animals, including:

- Chicken
- Cow
- Pig
- Sheep

All models are carefully designed to blend naturally with Minecraft’s aesthetic, ensuring a lightweight and performance-friendly experience.

⚙️ Performance Versions
3DPack is available in multiple versions so you can choose the best option for your computer:

Low – Optimized for low-end PCs
Medium – Balanced visuals and performance
High – Maximum detail for powerful PCs

✨ Features
- 3D models for multiple vanilla blocks
- Updated 3D item models
- Enhanced animal models (chicken, cow, pig, sheep)
- Vanilla-friendly visuals
- Optimized performance options (Low / Medium / High)

📌 Credits & Notice
Some 3D models used in this pack are based on assets from Vanilla Tweaks, including:

- 3D Doors
- 3D Trapdoors
- 3D Chains

These assets are used with proper credit to their original creators.

🔗 Vanilla Tweaks Credits Link:
https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
